# YavlGold Context for LLMs
This file contains the current product, architecture and routing policy for `apps/gold`.

---
# YAVLGOLD V1 - CURRENT PROJECT STATE

## 0. Canonical sources
- `AGENTS.md` (repo root) — canonical agent instructions
- `apps/gold/docs/ADN-VISUAL-V10.0.md` — immutable design system (V10.0)
- `apps/gold/docs/AGENT_REPORT_ACTIVE.md` — active operational report
- `FICHA_TECNICA.md` (repo root) — full technical spec
- Release policy: `V1` is the active visible product release; `V9.8` is historical only when explicitly labeled; `V10.0` refers to the visual DNA version, not the product release.

## 1. Product catalog
- `Agro` is the only released module in `V1` (facturero, crops, dashboard, stats, cart, planning, trash).
- `Academia`, `Social`, `Tecnologia` and `Crypto` are placeholder routes showing "no disponible". They are not active products and should not be presented as such.
- `Herramientas` and `Suite` are legacy aliases that redirect to placeholder routes, not official modules.

## 2. Architecture
- Vanilla JavaScript only (ES6+ Modules)
- Vite Multi-Page Application — NO SPA
- Supabase for auth, data, storage, edge functions
- Vercel for deploy and clean URLs
- Prohibited: React, Vue, Svelte, Angular, Next, Nuxt, Astro, Tailwind

## 3. Official routes
- `/` landing
- `/dashboard/` user dashboard
- `/agro/` released module
- `/academia/`, `/social/`, `/tecnologia/`, `/crypto/` unavailable placeholders
- `/open-source`, `/security`, `/anti-suplantacion`, `/privacy`, `/terms`, `/status` trust and operations pages
- `/health` public JSON health endpoint without secrets

## 3.1 Official channels
- X / Comunidad YavlGold: https://x.com/Yavlcapitan
- YouTube / YavlGold Pro: https://youtube.com/@yavlgoldpro
- LinkedIn / Yerikson Varela: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yavl-gold-7372b0302

## 4. Auth policy
- Global protected areas: `/dashboard` and `/agro`
- Landing auth entry uses `/index.html#login`
- Unavailable modules should not behave like protected released products

## 5. Visual policy (ADN Visual V10.0)
- Main background: `#0a0a0a`
- Gold accent: `#C8A752` (`--gold-4`)
- Headings: Orbitron
- Body/UI: Rajdhani
- Quotes: Playfair Display
- Icons: Font Awesome 6.5
- Do not introduce blue or purple as primary accent
- Always use CSS tokens (`var(--token)`), never hardcoded hex
- Interactions: 120-220ms, use opacity and transform
- Respect `prefers-reduced-motion`

## 6. Build
- Official validation command: `pnpm build:gold`
- Pipeline: agent-guard → agent-report-check → vite build → check-llms → check-dist-utf8
- agent-guard blocks prohibited dependencies at build time

## 7. Repo hygiene
- `AGENTS.md` is the single canonical instruction file for agents
- `AGENT.md` must not exist or be recreated
- `apps/gold/docs/AGENT_REPORT_ACTIVE.md` is the only active operational report
- `apps/gold/docs/AGENT_REPORT.md` is full historical diagnostics only (legacy, read-only)
- `apps/gold/docs/LEGACY_SURFACES.md` classifies orphan and legacy files
- `global_rules.md`, if present, is an operational copy and not a source of truth
- Playwright QA hygiene is mandatory: close the browser/context after each QA block and delete that block's temp folder under `%LOCALAPPDATA%\\Temp\\playwright-mcp-output\\<session-id>`

## 8. Agro module structure
- `agro.js` is the main monolith (~18k lines) — do NOT add new features here
- New features go in separate `agro-*.js` modules loaded dynamically
- Share monolith functions via `window._agroXxx` bridge
- Supabase tables use soft-delete (`deleted_at`) as standard pattern
- Supported currencies: COP, USD, VES
- Agro navigation: hub/module pattern with Inicio, Granja, Memoria, Menu; Granja contains Mi Granja: Mis cultivos, Calendario operativo, estadisticas/comparadores, Mis finanzas (Cartera Viva, Cartera Operativa, Mi Carrito), Trabajo Diario, Rankings de Clientes, Clima Agro. Operacion Comercial no debe tratarse como modulo/card del hub. Deep modules use contextual Volver and hide global navigation.

## 9. Repo hygiene
- `apps/gold/public/` is the **canonical live public** directory for the product
- `public/` at root was removed — all product assets live in `apps/gold/public/`
- Canonical Supabase rule: the only canonical Supabase folder is `/supabase` at repo root
- `apps/gold/supabase` was retired from the active tree on 2026-04-18 after controlled root bootstrap/reset validation
- Do not recreate migrations, Edge Functions, or Supabase config in `apps/gold/supabase`
- Any new Supabase duplication is operational debt and should be corrected

## 10. Legacy note
- YavlGold today is Agro. Everything else is compatibility or archive.
- Placeholder routes for unavailable modules exist to avoid 404s, not to suggest active products.
- Archived legacy HTML lives under `apps/gold/archive/legacy-html/`
- Archived legacy auth bridge lives under `apps/gold/archive/legacy-js/`
- The former dashboard music utility is retired from active build, routing, and navigation
- `herramientas/` is a residual directory with no active content

# EOF — YavlGold llms.txt (do not truncate)
